ksa_text: Knowledge of sector-specific data regulations and their interaction with general data protection law, including HIPAA (healthcare), GLBA and SOX (financial services), FERPA (education), and PCI DSS (payment card industry).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-K-004 (Risk & Compliance/Knowledge) scores 0.410 composite (highest: NICE at 0.410). Scope is in_scope for Clinical AI Specialist: 2 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, Risk & Compliance, composite 0.410. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk & Compliance for Clinical AI Specialist?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk & Compliance appears in approximately 75% of Clinical AI Specialist job postings. FDA 510(k)/HIPAA/CE marking regulatory knowledge required for most clinical AI roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Risk & Compliance is market-validated for Clinical AI Specialist. Final decision: include.
